plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: QuestLife uses your location to draw the route of an active quest.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: QuestLife uses your location during an active quest so route tracking can continue when your phone is locked.

plugins.cameraPermission: QuestLife uses your camera to capture memories during an active quest.

plugins.photosPermission: QuestLife can save the memories you choose to add to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: QuestLife can save the memories you choose to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: QuestLife uses your photos when you choose a Party photo, share a Party completion, or add a collection cover.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: QuestLife uses your camera to scan a friend's QR code.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: QuestLife uses your contacts to help you find friends already on QuestLife.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: QuestLife uses your location to show your active quest route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: QuestLife uses your location during an active quest so route recording can continue while your screen is locked.
